domains.name: Domain 1: Design Solutions for Organizational Complexity
Domain 3: Continuous Improvement for Existing Solutions

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to govern hundreds of accounts with SCPs and OU structure?
questions.explanation: Organizations provides multi-account governance.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to establish landing zones with guardrails?
questions.explanation: Control Tower automates multi-account setup.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to share subnets across accounts securely?
questions.explanation: RAM shares VPC subnets for shared services.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to centralize DNS and hybrid resolution?
questions.explanation: Resolver rules route DNS between on-prem and VPC.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to implement network hub-and-spoke at scale?
questions.explanation: Transit Gateway connects VPCs and on-prem.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to enforce service control for regulated workloads?
questions.explanation: SCPs limit maximum permissions per OU.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to provide self-service approved products?
questions.explanation: Service Catalog standardizes vetted deployments.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to audit cross-account access patterns?

questions.text: Which TWO practices align with the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

options.text: Design for failure and automate recovery
Use single-AZ for all production data stores

questions.explanation: Reliability and operational excellence emphasize automation, testing, and learning from failure.

questions.text: Which TWO official AWS resources help you prepare for AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional? (Select TWO.)
questions.explanation: Use official AWS exam guides, Skill Builder, and AWS documentation—not real exam content.
